projectDescription: A local-multiplayer movie party game with two modes — Charades (act out films for your team) and Impostor (find the player who doesn't know the movie) — powered by the TMDB API.
keyFeatures: Two game modes: Charades (team-based acting) and Impostor (social deduction)
Real-time countdown timer with configurable durations (30s / 60s / 90s)
Movie cards fetched from TMDB with poster, synopsis, director, and genres
Flip-card UI showing movie poster on front and full synopsis on back
Persistent game state via Zustand + localStorage
Dark/light theme toggle with system preference detection
Animated UI with Framer Motion transitions
No account or login required — fully local multiplayer
publicApiSurface: GET /api/movies?count={n} — returns n random high-rated movies from TMDB (1–20)
useGameStore() — Zustand store for all game state and actions
useTranslation() — React hook for EN/ES i18n via LangContext
GameStore interface — full typed surface of actions: startGame, startImpostorGame, correctGuess, endRound, nextTeam, eliminatePlayer, resetGame, refillMovies, etc.
Movie interface — id, title, poster_path, year, rating, overview, genres, director
Team interface — name, score, players, current_player_index
